name: patternguard
description: Guard AI-agent code changes against pattern drift: plan the blast radius, execute within bounds, and review sibling consistency before committing.

interface.shortDescription: Guard agent code changes against pattern drift
interface.longDescription: Three coordinated skills for codebases operated by AI agents and subagents. patternguard-planner maps every file a change touches, ensures .patternguard/ exists, records duplicated patterns, marks template candidates when repetition justifies it, and promotes them to template mode only when a generator command already exists. patternguard-executor applies changes safely with four self-selected modes: Bootstrap, Solo, Orchestrator, and Subagent; candidate-only patterns stay duplicated, while template-backed patterns regenerate only when template and generator.command are present. patternguard-reviewer verifies correctness and sibling consistency after changes, producing approved, changes-needed, or escalate verdicts. Works on both greenfield and existing projects.
defaultPrompt: Use patternguard-planner to map the structure for a new feature
Use patternguard-executor to apply a change across all affected routes
Use patternguard-reviewer to verify changes before committing
